name: Medical Transportation
districts_or_customers: Individual patients (dialysis, doctor appts) in San Francisco; no school district contracts identified. Address 1485 Bayshore Blvd is shared with SkyCoast Mobility and CityWheelchairs, suggesting a small NEMT operator co-located at that mobility hub.
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Generic 'Medical Transportation' name and tiny revenue (~$409K, 5 employees) consistent with a one-van NEMT micro-operator, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in fit. Appears to be a micro-NEMT/wheelchair-van operator in SF with no evidence of school district contracts or yellow-bus operations. Below platform's tuck-in size threshold and wrong service line.

name: Luxury Limousine
districts_or_customers: No school district customers identified. Suisun City PO Box listing; appears to be a small black-car/limo operator. The 'special_needs=1' flag in the source data is not corroborated by any web evidence of SPED/IEP transportation contracts.
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Several similarly named small limo operators in Suisun City (Champion Limo, SR Limousine, AAL Airport Limo) dominate the local market; 'Luxury Limousine' has no discernible web footprint.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in fit. Generic limousine/livery operator with no evidence of student transportation contracts. Sub-scale (~$394K, 6 employees) and wrong service category for a school-bus platform.

name: Life Of Leisure Limousines
districts_or_customers: No school district customers identified. Listed as a Nashville-area limo operator on limos.com and Yelp; serves weddings, proms, and airport runs out of Joelton/Pleasant View, TN.
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Has Facebook page and limos.com / taxilimo directory listings but no growth, safety, or ownership news.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in fit. Pure livery/special-occasion limousine operator with no school bus or SPED contracts. Wrong vertical and far below platform scale.

name: Agape Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Not in the 2021-2022 Mississippi School District Pupil Transportation Directory; Moss Point SD runs its own transportation under Supervisor Sharon Scott. No district contracts identified.
recent_news: BBB file indicates the Moss Point MS entity is 'no longer in business' as of recent reviews. (Note: A separately owned Arizona company also uses the Agape Transportation name with website agape-transport.com - unrelated to this MS LLC.)
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in fit. Likely defunct per BBB; was a tiny NEMT/charter operator with no public-school contracts. Skip.

name: A A A Medex
owner_or_parent: Part of Tucson's AAA/Yellow Cab family (alternate names include Yellow Cab Co. and AAA Cab Service, Inc.)
principals: Unknown (operates under the AAA Transport/Yellow Cab Tucson umbrella)
districts_or_customers: AHCCCS (Arizona Medicaid) NEMT provider list; individual elderly/disabled riders in Tucson. No school district pupil transportation contracts identified.
recent_news: No M&A news. Operates as a division of AAA Transport / Yellow Cab Tucson at 1055 E 18th St, Tucson; long-standing local operator (lineage to 1922) but limited to taxi/NEMT lines.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in fit. NEMT/taxi brand within the Tucson AAA Transport/Yellow Cab umbrella; not an independent school-bus contractor. Wrong vertical.
